Public Methods

public abstract void onError (byte error)

Called when an error occurs during the provisioning operation.

Parameters
error byte: ProvisioningError The type of error that occurred during provisioning.
Throws
RemoteException

public abstract void onSuccess (String url, String destination)

Called when the provisioning operation completes successfully.

Parameters
url String: The URL of the provisioned resource.
destination String: The destination path where the resource was stored.
Throws
RemoteException
